creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Reported by portscout.

Upstream changes:

 - Update dependencies.
 - Use the native archive/zip rather than the fork on Go 1.17
   if not using the zip117 build tag.

Changelog: https://github.com/pgaskin/kepubify/releases/tag/v4.0.1

Other changes:

 - set version string in binary
 - add converters category

Tested with Poudriere on armv7 arm64 FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE.
